title: paspalum gracielae
intro: Paspalum gracielae is a species of grass that belongs to the Paspalum genus, commonly referred to as the 'false smut grass'. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Paspalum gracielae is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-asthmatic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
